scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/shell-app & npm run dev --workspace=packages/remote-orders & npm run dev --workspace=packages/remote-settings
scripts.build:libs: npm run build --workspace=packages/auth-contract && npm run build --workspace=packages/federation-config && npm run build --workspace=packages/auth-shell-provider && npm run build --workspace=packages/auth-mfe-consumer
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=packages/shell-app & npm run build --workspace=packages/remote-orders & npm run build --workspace=packages/remote-settings
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:apps
scripts.preview: npm run preview --workspace=packages/shell-app & npm run preview --workspace=packages/remote-orders & npm run preview --workspace=packages/remote-settings
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
